name: Top Noodle Soup
narration: TOP RAMEN IS ALWAYS A SIMPLE, DELICIOUS PLEASURE, as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients. PERFECT FOR A SNACK, MEAL OR SIDE DISH NO ADDED MSG QUICK AND EASY TO MAKE! Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Add noodles, breaking up if desired. Cook for 3 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat. Stir in seasonings from flavor packet and eat. (To lower sodium, use less seasoning) VEGETARIAN OPTION AVAILABLE: Try Top Ramen Soy Sauce flavor

items: TOP RAMEN IS ALWAYS A SIMPLE, DELICIOUS PLEASURE, as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients
PERFECT FOR A SNACK, MEAL OR SIDE DISH

QUICK AND EASY TO MAKE! Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan. Add noodles, breaking up if desired. Cook for 3 minutes or until noodles are tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat. Stir in seasonings from flavor packet and eat. (To lower sodium, use less seasoning)
VEGETARIAN OPTION AVAILABLE: Try Top Ramen Soy Sauce flavor

blocks.text: THE ORIGINAL INSTANT RAMEN NOODLE SINCE 1970 Delicious as is or tossed with your favorite ingredients, Top Ramen is always a simple pleasure. With no added MSG, the great taste you love has been stripped down to its essential noodle goodness. Even vegetarians can enjoy our Soy Sauce and Chili flavors with their favorite toppings

name: Chicken Instant Ramen Noodles
variant: Chicken Instant Ramen Noodles Ready to Eat Meals, 3 Oz, 24 Count
narration: COOKS IN 3 MINUTES: Cooking Directions: 1.) Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan, add noodles and cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally. See details in the description box

items: COOKS IN 3 MINUTES: Cooking Directions: 1.) Boil 2 cups of water in a saucepan, add noodles and cook for 3 minutes stirring occasionally. 2.) Turn off heat, add contents of seasoning packet, stir well for 1 minute until seasoning is fully dissolved. Makes 2, 8 oz. servings. 3.) Product is very hot. Allow to cook, serve and enjoy
PACKED WITH FLAVOR: Chicken flavor. Not your ordinary chicken noodle soup. Enjoy ramen perfectly seasoned with the savory taste of chicken

FAMILY FAVORITE: Maruchan ramen is one of the nation’s favorite ramen soup brands. Maruchan offers a wide variety of delicious Ramen flavors including less sodium Ramen and authentic ethnic flavor products. Maruchan Ramen makes a creative addition to any recipe. The possibilities are endless
GREAT COLLEGE GIFT: Ramen is a staple snack for college kids so help feed their late-night study cravings with Maruchan ramen! Send a snack care package to your college student

name: Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup
variant: Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup, 10.75 Ounce Can (Pack of 4)
narration: Four (4) 10.75 oz cans of Campbell’s Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup. Soul-warming chicken soup crafted with perfectly seasoned golden chicken broth, egg noodles, and tender chicken meat with no antibiotics

blocks.text: Cozy up with a steamy bowl of Campbell’s Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup. A family favorite for generations, this delicious chicken soup is crafted with perfectly seasoned golden chicken broth, egg noodles, and tender chicken meat with no antibiotics. The result is a canned chicken noodle soup that brings a smile with every spoonful. Top it with Pepperidge Farm Golden Butter Crackers, season it with fresh herbs, or pair it with a sandwich or salad for something quick and easy. This convenient canned soup is a year-round pantry staple and the perfect comfort food on a chilly day or when you’re feeling under the weather. Simply mix the condensed soup with 1 can of water and microwave on high for 2.5 to 3 minutes in a covered microwave-safe bowl, or heat in a pot on the stove, stirring occasionally. Each 10.75 oz recyclable can contains about 2.5 servings of microwave soup and features a non-BPA lining. From Chicken Noodle to Cream of Mushroom and everything in between, Campbell’s makes delicious soups in flavors your family knows and loves, with quality, farm-grown ingredients in every can. M’m! M’m! Good!

Campbell’s Condensed Chicken Noodle Soup warms the soul and has earned its place in the pantry as a family favorite. Join Campbell’s in the kitchen by customizing our soup with fresh herbs or croutons, or pair it with crackers, salad, or a sandwich. We perfectly season our golden chicken broth and add in fresh egg noodles and roasted chicken meat raised without antibiotics. The end result is a soul-warming chicken noodle soup that brings a smile with every spoonful. Made with honest, high-quality ingredients like egg noodles, this canned soup is a crowd pleaser and makes for the perfect addition to your weeknight family dinner that everyone will love. This trusted staple is the start to a great meal. M’m! M’m! Good! From Chicken Noodle to Tomato and everything in between, Campbell’s makes delicious soups with quality, farm-grown ingredients in flavors you and your family know and love. Whether Campbell’s Condensed canned soups are the start of great recipes or you want to simmer down with the perfect bowl, we have a soup that everyone can enjoy.

narration: 4 Delicious Flavors in One Pack – Enjoy variety with Chicken, Spicy Beef, Spicy Kimchi, and Spicy Curry flavors—each rich in flavor and crafted for bold, satisfying taste

blocks.text: The brand Hethstia began with a single vision: discover the possibilities of healthy lifestyle. Exploring all possible food solutions with natural material, it is an on-going journey for Hethstia. Hethstia is founded on the strong belief that healthy food should be in everyone’s daily life. Hethstia is a healthy food brand for those who are looking for healthy diet solutions in daily life.

Today, people are paying more attention to their health, especially when faced with different sub-health issues like obesity or diabetes, so we offer a wide variety of healthy and natural food products that are produced from our sustainable plant base from farm to plate, currently reaching over 50 countries worldwide

additionalInfo.Flavor Name: Spicy Beef, Spicy Curry, Variety, Chicken Flavor, Spicy Kimchi
